candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line from candidate list; preferred reported revenue label.
Also a valid top-line sales label in the preview, but not in candidate list; Total Revenue is sufficient.

variables.notes: Chose the direct reported revenue line from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and more specific than the duplicate-style alternative 'Cost of revenues/COGS'.
Also valid and numerically identical, but less preferred than the cleaner direct label.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; should not be used when the direct reported line exists.

variables.notes: Used the direct reported COGS line; excluded balancing/duplicate-style labels.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component above operating profit.
Clear SG&A overhead component above operating profit.
Dedicated R&D expense above operating profit; included in XSGA as well so XSGA - XRD removes it per rule.
Could be overhead, but values appear tied to FX/other operating items rather than core SG&A; excluded.

variables.notes: CR:nc|high. No single explicit SG&A subtotal row exists. Selected core overhead components. Included 'Research and Development Expenses' because it is a separate above-EBIT operating expense and PROF uses XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best match.
Supplemental and empty; less preferred than the main reported line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not the main R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense component; preferred over total finance costs.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component; include alongside interest expense.
Broader total that may include non-interest items; not preferred when granular interest rows exist.
May be finance-related but not clearly interest; excluded to avoid non-interest/non-recurring items.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest components over broader 'Finance costs' to avoid including non-interest finance items.

candidates.why: Best available equity line from candidate list; no separate parent-equity line is shown.
Duplicate capitalization variant also present; lower priority alternate.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line or non-controlling interest line is shown, so used total equity and left MIB empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income line is not a balance-sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest item.

variables.notes: No balance-sheet minority interest / non-controlling interests line is present in the preview.
